TCCR Backend — Full API Test Report

Monday, 18 May 2026 15:48:12
Total Iterations

1

Total Assertions

0

Total Skipped Tests

0

File Information
Collection: CMP Backend
Collection Description
Course Management Portal — all service endpoints via gateway :3000. Local setup: 1. Run: node scripts/seed-emulator.js (seeds 4 test users) 2. Import CMP_Local environment and select it 3. Run '🔐 Sign In' requests to populate tokens 4. Work through numbered folders in order for the full flow Test users (seeded by seed-emulator.js): superadmin@cmp.com SuperAdmin@123 admin@cmp.com Admin@12345 student1@cmp.com Student1@123 (pending_approval) student2@cmp.com Student2@123 (pre-approved) V2 notes: - Cell Service tests use adminToken for leader-role operations (admin inherits all leader permissions) - Analytics requires g12+ or leader+; use adminToken - Role Requests: student2 requests the 'student' role from admin
Timings and Data
Total run duration: 1m 0.7s
Total data received: 56.83KB
Average response time: 47ms
